task_completion.description: Configure GBP salary band for Software Engineer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Pay Grade configuration screen for 'Software Engineer' showing 'GBP' (or British Pound) with a Minimum Salary of 45,000 and a Maximum Salary of 85,000.

task_completion.description: Configure EUR salary band for Software Engineer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Pay Grade configuration screen for 'Software Engineer' showing 'EUR' (or Euro) with a Minimum Salary of 50,000 and a Maximum Salary of 95,000.

task_completion.description: Configure GBP salary band for Data Scientist
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Pay Grade configuration screen for 'Data Scientist' showing 'GBP' (or British Pound) with a Minimum Salary of 55,000 and a Maximum Salary of 100,000.

task_completion.description: Configure EUR salary band for Data Scientist
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Pay Grade configuration screen for 'Data Scientist' showing 'EUR' (or Euro) with a Minimum Salary of 65,000 and a Maximum Salary of 110,000.

task_completion.description: Assign Base Salary UK to Michael Chen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Michael Chen's employee profile or salary details screen showing Salary Component 'Base Salary UK', Pay Frequency 'Monthly', Currency 'GBP' (or British Pound), and Amount '52,000'.

task_completion.description: Assign Base Salary EU to David Morris
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for David Morris's employee profile or salary details screen showing Salary Component 'Base Salary EU', Pay Frequency 'Monthly', Currency 'EUR' (or Euro), and Amount '72,000'.

integrity.description: Agent used the HR management system GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web-based HR system (like OrangeHRM), not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Salary assignments were done within actual employee profiles
integrity.visual_evidence: The salary assignments should be visible in the context of the employee's profile page within the application, not typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: Results appear to be genuine system configurations
integrity.visual_evidence: The forms and tables should look like standard application UI elements without signs of browser developer tools or HTML manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Software Engineer pay grade must have GBP (Min 45000, Max 85000) and EUR (Min 50000, Max 95000). Data Scientist pay grade must have GBP (Min 55000, Max 100000) and EUR (Min 65000, Max 110000). Michael Chen must have a salary component 'Base Salary UK' of 52000 GBP (Monthly). David Morris must have a salary component 'Base Salary EU' of 72000 EUR (Monthly).
